Class StrassenLinearAlgebraProvider<E extends Field<E>>

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.providers.CPUDenseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
org.jscience.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.providers.StrassenLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
LinearAlgebraProvider<E>, AlgorithmProvider
@AutoService(LinearAlgebraProvider.class) public class StrassenLinearAlgebraProvider<E extends Field<E>> extends CPUDenseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
Linear Algebra Provider that forces the use of the Strassen algorithm. Intended for benchmarking and comparison purposes.
